---
title: "ex12. Causal (Same backend, SB Backend) - Laplace Kernel"
---




> **Website workflow note.**
> This page reflects the current exported API and recommended wrapper-first usage.
> Last updated: **2026-02-19**.
>
> For the full package narrative, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).


# Causal Inference: Same Backend (SB) - Laplace Kernel {#causal-sb-same-backend}

This vignette fits two SB-based causal models using the same kernel (Laplace):

- Model A: bulk-only outcome models (GPD = FALSE)
- Model B: GPD-augmented outcome models (GPD = TRUE)

## What you’ll learn

- How to hold backend + kernel fixed and isolate the impact of **tail augmentation** (`GPD = FALSE` vs `TRUE`).
- How tail augmentation can change conclusions about upper-quantile behavior even when mean effects look similar.
- How to run the standard causal post-fit workflow for multiple estimands (mean, quantiles, conditional effects when \(X\) is present).

## When to use this template

- You want a clean sensitivity check focused on tail modeling rather than backend/kernel changes.
- You want predictable runtime and an explicit complexity knob (`components`) inside a causal workflow.

---

## Data Setup


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
data("causal_alt_real500_p4_k2")
y <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$y
A <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$A
X <- as.matrix(causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$X)

summary_tbl <- tibble(
  statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"),
  value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y))
)

summary_tbl
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 5 × 2
  statistic   value
  <chr>       <dbl>
1 N         500    
2 Mean        0.274
3 SD          1.76 
4 Min        -8.09 
5 Max         5.27 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
x_eval <- X[1:40, , drop = FALSE]
y_eval <- y[1:40]
u_threshold <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(y, 0.8, names = FALSE))
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
df_causal <- data.frame(y = y, A = as.factor(A), x1 = X[, 1], x2 = X[, 2])

p_scatter <- ggplot(df_causal, aes(x = x1, y = y, color = A)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Outcome vs X1 by Treatment", newdata ="X1", y = "y", color = "Treatment") +
  theme_minimal()

p_scatter
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/data-scatter-1.png){width=768}
:::
:::


---

## Model A: SB Bulk-only (Laplace)


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
bundle_sb_bulk <- bundle(
  x = y,
  treat = A,
  X = X,
  kernel = "laplace",
  backend = "sb",
  PS = "logit",
  GPD = FALSE,
  components = 5,
  mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 400, nburnin = 100, nchains = 1, thin = 2, seed = 1),
  mcmc_ps = list(niter = 400, nburnin = 100, nchains = 1, thin = 2, seed = 1)
)

bundle_sb_bulk
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
CausalMixGPD causal bundle
PS model: Bayesian logit (A | X) 
      Field                Treated                Control
    Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process
     Kernel                laplace                laplace
 Components                      5                      5
   GPD tail                  FALSE                  FALSE
    Epsilon                  0.025                  0.025

Outcome PS included: TRUE 
n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(bundle_sb_bulk)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
CausalMixGPD causal bundle summary
CausalMixGPD causal bundle
PS model: Bayesian logit (A | X) 
      Field                Treated                Control
    Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process
     Kernel                laplace                laplace
 Components                      5                      5
   GPD tail                  FALSE                  FALSE
    Epsilon                  0.025                  0.025

Outcome PS included: TRUE 
n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
fit_sb_bulk <- load_or_fit(
  "ex12-causal-same-backend-sb-fit_sb_bulk",
  quiet_mcmc(dpmix.causal(bundle_sb_bulk))
)
summary(fit_sb_bulk)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
-- PS fit --
CausalMixGPD PS fit
model: logit 

-- Outcome fits --
[control]
MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE
n = 232 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025
MCMC: niter=400, nburnin=100, thin=2, nchains=1 
Fit
Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions.

[treated]
MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE
n = 268 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025
MCMC: niter=400, nburnin=100, thin=2, nchains=1 
Fit
Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
params(fit_sb_bulk)
```

```{.r .cell-code}

                          interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 100)
```

## Model B: SB with GPD Tail (Laplace)


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
param_specs_gpd <- list(
  gpd = list(
    threshold = list(
      mode = "dist",
      dist = "lognormal",
      args = list(meanlog = log(max(u_threshold, .Machine$double.eps)), sdlog = 0.25)
    )
  )
)

bundle_sb_gpd <- bundle(
  x = y,
  treat = A,
  X = X,
  kernel = "laplace",
  backend = "sb",
  PS = "logit",
  GPD = TRUE,
  components = 5,
  param_specs = param_specs_gpd,
  mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 400, nburnin = 100, nchains = 1, thin = 2, seed = 2),
  mcmc_ps = list(niter = 400, nburnin = 100, nchains = 1, thin = 2, seed = 2)
)

bundle_sb_gpd
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
CausalMixGPD causal bundle
PS model: Bayesian logit (A | X) 
      Field                Treated                Control
    Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process
     Kernel                laplace                laplace
 Components                      5                      5
   GPD tail                   TRUE                   TRUE
    Epsilon                  0.025                  0.025

Outcome PS included: TRUE 
n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(bundle_sb_gpd)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
CausalMixGPD causal bundle summary
CausalMixGPD causal bundle
PS model: Bayesian logit (A | X) 
      Field                Treated                Control
    Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process
     Kernel                laplace                laplace
 Components                      5                      5
   GPD tail                   TRUE                   TRUE
    Epsilon                  0.025                  0.025

Outcome PS included: TRUE 
n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
fit_sb_gpd <- load_or_fit(
  "ex12-causal-same-backend-sb-fit_sb_gpd",
  quiet_mcmc(dpmgpd.causal(bundle_sb_gpd))
)
summary(fit_sb_gpd)
```

```
Fit
Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions.

Fit
Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions.
```
